description_long: This is a women's wedge sandal featuring a medium-brown criss-cross leather upper that covers the front of the foot. The sandal has a contoured tan footbed with visible stitching along the edge, providing both comfort and style. The wedge sole is made of a wood-textured material with a lighter accent at the heel, giving it a fashionable and slightly elevated look. The open-toe and open-heel design make it suitable for warm weather and casual urban outings. The construction appears sturdy, with the upper securely attached to the sole. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and well-crafted, ideal for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A brown criss-cross wedge sandal with a contoured tan footbed and wood-textured sole, featuring an open-toe and open-heel design. Stylish and comfortable, suitable for urban casual wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown criss-cross leather upper, contoured tan footbed, and wood-textured wedge sole with a light accent at the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design and overlapping brown straps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the criss-cross upper, wedge sole, and the lighter heel accent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open heel, the width of the wedge, and the footbed's contour.
